explanations.4: This image name includes 'hardened' and a version tag, meaning it's a customized security-focused version of FrankenPHP with Joomla pre-configured, not the standard FrankenPHP image.
explanations.11: JOOMLA_DB_HOST is set to 'db' because in Docker Compose, services can reach each other by their service name as a hostname instead of an IP address.
explanations.16: The volume 'joomla:/app/public' creates a persistent storage location so that Joomla files survive container restarts; the left side is the volume name, the right side is where it mounts inside the container.
explanations.28: Similarly, the 'db' volume persists MySQL data at /var/lib/mysql so your database isn't lost when the container stops.
